examples: My wife just stood there dumbfounded like a blockhead, forgetting even to help my mother up.
Arnold is a blockhead if I ever saw one.
No man but a blockhead ever wrote except for money.
"Don't be a blockhead, " Superior Court Judge Dwayne Moring told Robbins, borrowing a line from Charlie Brown's friend Lucy.
All you need is one blockhead to ruin it for everyone.
